projects.title: Kai's Dream
projects.oneLineHook: Kai's Dream is an open world, first person walking simulator with a unique and interesting camera mechanic.
projects.problem: Kais Dream is an immersive open-world first-person walking simulator that invites players to explore a dreamlike environment, uncover hidden narratives, and interact with a unique camera-based mechanic. The project was funded by the prestigious Epic MegaGrant, reflecting its innovative vision and potential. Developed in Unreal Engine, the game combines stunning visuals, atmospheric sound design, and groundbreaking gameplay mechanics to create an unforgettable experience.
architectureHighlights: Development:Built the game using Unreal Engine, leveraging Blueprints for rapid prototyping and C++ for optimized performance-critical features.Wrote custom shaders to achieve surreal visual effects, enhancing the dreamlike atmosphere of the game.Optimized the game for seamless performance across various PC configurations, using LOD systems, texture compression, and dynamic lighting techniques.
Optimized the game for seamless performance across various PC configurations, using LOD systems, texture compression, and dynamic lighting techniques.
Optimized the game for seamless performance across various PC configurations, using LOD systems, texture compression, and dynamic lighting techniques.

Technical Innovation:Developed a proprietary camera system that interacts dynamically with the game world, capturing specific elements that influence player progression.Created modular environmental assets and an asset streaming system to enable smooth loading in the expansive open-world setting.Implemented advanced post-processing techniques to create a cinematic feel and enhance player immersion.
Developed a proprietary camera system that interacts dynamically with the game world, capturing specific elements that influence player progression.

projects.title: Anant Ratri
projects.oneLineHook: Anant Ratri is a psychological horror game based in a procedurally generated world.
projects.problem: Anant Ratriis a personal passion project that redefines the psychological horror genre with a unique twist. The game leverages procedurally generated worldsto heighten fear and confusion, ensuring no two playthroughs are alike. This project emphasizes immersive gameplay, unsettling environments, and robust mechanics, making it a standout horror experience.
architectureHighlights: Development:Created an advanced procedural generation systemto dynamically generate haunting, non-repetitive environments.Developed procedural toolsthat empower designers to quickly build and customize levels with minimal manual effort. These tools simplified asset placement, terrain adjustments, and path generation.Built custom interaction systems, including inventory mechanics, interactive puzzles, and environmental manipulation.Handcrafted visual effects, materials, and shaders to create a surreal and disturbing aesthetic.
Created an advanced procedural generation systemto dynamically generate haunting, non-repetitive environments.
Created an advanced procedural generation systemto dynamically generate haunting, non-repetitive environments.
Built custom interaction systems, including inventory mechanics, interactive puzzles, and environmental manipulation.
Built custom interaction systems, including inventory mechanics, interactive puzzles, and environmental manipulation.

Technical Innovation:Designed and implemented designer-friendly procedural generation tools, enabling rapid iteration and creative freedom.Optimized performance for PC, ensuring real-time rendering of complex procedural elements on mid-range hardware.Developed modular inventory and interaction systems, making them scalable and reusable.Leveraged dynamic environmental cues to manipulate player emotions and enhance immersion.
Developed modular inventory and interaction systems, making them scalable and reusable.

projects.title: Red Hot Ball
projects.oneLineHook: Red Hot Ball is a simple puzzle game with a unique mechanic.
projects.problem: Red Hot Ball is a physics-based puzzle game inspired by the viral fascination with red-hot balls melting through objects. The game challenges players to strategically heat a ball and navigate obstacles to progress through uniquely designed levels. This project not only marked my first self-released game but also served as a foundation for creating a robust game development pipeline that significantly accelerates the production of future casual games.
architectureHighlights: Development:Built the entire game architecture, including the physics-driven core mechanic, level progression system, and reward mechanics (star-based scoring).Integrated Google Play Services for achievements and leaderboards, fostering player engagement and competition.Designed an efficient modular codebase, enabling rapid iteration and seamless addition of new levels or mechanics.
Built the entire game architecture, including the physics-driven core mechanic, level progression system, and reward mechanics (star-based scoring).
Built the entire game architecture, including the physics-driven core mechanic, level progression system, and reward mechanics (star-based scoring).
Designed an efficient modular codebase, enabling rapid iteration and seamless addition of new levels or mechanics.
Designed an efficient modular codebase, enabling rapid iteration and seamless addition of new levels or mechanics.

Pipeline Innovation:Developed a streamlined pipeline for hyper-casual game development by leveraging task prioritization, asset workflow automation, and modular templates for UI and mechanics.Built custom tools within Unity to automate repetitive tasks such as texture optimization and prefab generation, significantly reducing development time.

projects.title: Rokeya's Garden
projects.oneLineHook: Rokeya's Garden is a VR experience made to commemorate the legacy of the legendary Indian writer Rokeya Begum Hussain.
projects.problem: Rokeya's Garden is an immersive interactive experience blending open-world exploration with narrative storytelling, developed as part of a project funded by the Indian Foundation of Arts (IFA). Showcased at Animela Festival (Mumbai) and IFA's event (Bangalore), the project was celebrated for its innovative use of WebGL and VR to bring art and storytelling to life.
systemDesignHighlights: Development:Solely handled all development tasks, including programming and performance optimization, using Unity.Integrated the Google Cardboard SDK to enable a seamless VR experience on Android devices.Built and optimized the WebGL version, tackling challenges like ensuring smooth frame rates and compatibility across web platforms.

projects.title: IMHO
projects.oneLineHook: IMHO is an anonymous friend Q&A + social games appshare your link, get honest messages, and play viral prompts.
projects.problem: IMHO: Anonymous Friend Q&Ais a social app for open, honest interactions. You share a customizable IMHO link on Instagram, Snapchat, or WhatsApp; friends respond anonymously, and you reply or turn answers into shareable moments. It also includes viral social mini-games like Ask Me Anything, Unpopular Opinion, Rizzler, and CUPID, with an IMHO Protier that adds extras like sender-hint perks.
architectureHighlights: Development:Built modular anonymous Q&A flowswith shareable links, inbox & reply UX, and notifications.Created a games hubarchitecture for plug-and-play formats (AMA, Unpopular Opinion, Rizzler, CUPID).Added multi-language supportfor multiple Indian and international languages, including right-to-left (RTL) scriptslike Arabic.Built native plugins for Android and iOSto facilitate seamless content copying and sharing into social appssuch as Instagram, WhatsApp, and Snapchat.
Built modular anonymous Q&A flowswith shareable links, inbox & reply UX, and notifications.
Built modular anonymous Q&A flowswith shareable links, inbox & reply UX, and notifications.
Created a games hubarchitecture for plug-and-play formats (AMA, Unpopular Opinion, Rizzler, CUPID).
Created a games hubarchitecture for plug-and-play formats (AMA, Unpopular Opinion, Rizzler, CUPID).

Data & Strategy:Designed and deployed a custom analytics architectureto capture granular player events, funnels, and experiments.Enabled A/B testingon onboarding, link sharing, paywalls, and game prompts to drive data-backed iteration and improve engagement.
Designed and deployed a custom analytics architectureto capture granular player events, funnels, and experiments.
Designed and deployed a custom analytics architectureto capture granular player events, funnels, and experiments.

Optimization Expertise:Optimized startup and deep-link open times with lazy loading and caching.Reduced APK size via asset pruning and modularization.Integrated anti-spam/rate-limit mechanismsto keep sessions clean.

projects.title: Procedural Animations
projects.oneLineHook: In this project I learned and made procedural animation systems using UE5 control rig.
projects.problem: This study explores the power and flexibility of procedural animationsin Unreal Engine 5 using Control Rigs. Unlike traditional hand-made or motion-captured animations, procedural animations are calculated in real-time, making them highly adaptable to environmental changes and dynamic gameplay scenarios.
approach: By integrating procedural techniques with traditional animations, I developed innovative systems that offer unparalleled realism and responsiveness for character movements, solving key challenges in complex animation scenarios.
architectureHighlights: Procedural Animation System Design:Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.Implemented advanced terrain adaptation, enabling accurate foot placement and rotationon uneven and complex surfaces.
Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.
Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.
Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.
Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.

Layered Animation System:Combined procedural animations with traditional keyframed and motion-captured animations to create blended, realistic movements.Integrated procedural rigs with physics simulationsfor enhanced interactions, such as characters dynamically reacting to forces or objects.
systemDesignHighlights: Procedural Animation System Design:Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.Implemented advanced terrain adaptation, enabling accurate foot placement and rotationon uneven and complex surfaces.
Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.
Developed a control rig-based animation systemto dynamically manipulate skeleton bones based on real-time game inputs.
Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.
Created a system that adjusts animations to varying speeds, ensuring seamless transitions between walking, running, and other movements.

Custom Features:Designed and implemented parameters for easy customization of animation components, including stride length, step height, pelvis tilt, and more.Integrated physics-based interactionswith procedural animations to create unique, dynamic movements, such as objects reacting to character interactions in real-time.Developed hand detection logicfor interactive gameplay features, allowing characters to respond naturally to objects in their environment.
Integrated physics-based interactionswith procedural animations to create unique, dynamic movements, such as objects reacting to character interactions in real-time.

Layered Animation System:Combined procedural animations with traditional keyframed and motion-captured animations to create blended, realistic movements.Integrated procedural rigs with physics simulationsfor enhanced interactions, such as characters dynamically reacting to forces or objects.

projects.title: Procedural Character Interactions
projects.oneLineHook: In Subliminal, I used Unreal Engine 5 and Control Rig to create procedural animations that layer natural environmental interactions over hand-made animations.
projects.problem: For the Subliminalproject, I developed procedural character interactionsthat allowed characters to respond naturally to their environment. By layering procedural animationson top of hand-made animations, the characters dynamically reacted to environmental factors like walls and terrain, enhancing realism in the game.
architectureHighlights: Procedural Animation & Control Rig:Used Unreal Engine 5s Control Rigto create complex procedural animation systems, layering them seamlessly over pre-made animations.Developed custom IK (Inverse Kinematics) controlsto allow for more precise and responsive limb movement based on environmental interactions.
Used Unreal Engine 5s Control Rigto create complex procedural animation systems, layering them seamlessly over pre-made animations.
Used Unreal Engine 5s Control Rigto create complex procedural animation systems, layering them seamlessly over pre-made animations.

Programming & Scripting:Wrote custom scriptsto integrate the procedural animation system with the games physics, ensuring smooth and natural transitions between different animation states based on real-time feedback from the environment.

Wrote custom scriptsto integrate the procedural animation system with the games physics, ensuring smooth and natural transitions between different animation states based on real-time feedback from the environment.

projects.title: Design Previewer

projects.title: Automated Animation Pipeline
projects.oneLineHook: In this project, I developed an AI-driven animation pipeline that automated facial motion capture, rendering, and video generation using Audio2Face, Unreal Engine, and Python.
projects.role: Pipeline Developer | Technical Artist | Team Lead
projects.problem: I collaborated with Constituents AIto develop an automated animation pipelinethat streamlined the generation of facial animations from voice input. The system integrated multiple cutting-edge tools, including NVIDIA Omniverse Audio2Face (A2F), Unreal Engine Editor Scripting, and a custom web interface, to create a seamless animation workflow.
approach: This pipeline automates the traditionally labor-intensive process of lip-sync animation and facial motion capture, significantly reducing time and manual effort while maintaining high-quality results.
architectureHighlights: Pipeline Integration & Development:Designed and implemented the module that receives audio inputfrom the web interface and processes it through the pipeline.Developed a Python-based automation systemlinking NVIDIA Omniverse Audio2Face with Unreal Engine.Ensured headless executionof Unreal Engine and A2F for optimal performance and scalability.
Designed and implemented the module that receives audio inputfrom the web interface and processes it through the pipeline.
Designed and implemented the module that receives audio inputfrom the web interface and processes it through the pipeline.
Developed a Python-based automation systemlinking NVIDIA Omniverse Audio2Face with Unreal Engine.
Developed a Python-based automation systemlinking NVIDIA Omniverse Audio2Face with Unreal Engine.

Rendering & Processing:Automated movie renderingin Unreal Engine using the Movie Render Pipeline, outputting image sequences.Implemented FFmpeg automation with Pythonto convert rendered image sequences into a finalized video format.Developed a system to send the final video output back to the web interface, completing the pipeline.

projects.title: Word Zenith
projects.oneLineHook: Word Zenith is a relaxing word-puzzle game that blends crossword depth with word search simplicity.
projects.problem: Word Zenithis a word-puzzle game blending crossword depth with word search flow. Built for a broad casual audience, it features thousands of handcrafted levels, daily challenges, and a calming, zen-inspired presentation. Available on the Google Play Store and Apple App store, it balances accessibility, challenge, and clean monetization.
architectureHighlights: Data & Strategy:Introduced an A/B testing architectureand drove data-informed decisions, improving retention by ~12%.Ran experiments on ad pacing, paywall copy, and bundle pricing to optimise ARPDAUwithout hurting engagement.
Introduced an A/B testing architectureand drove data-informed decisions, improving retention by ~12%.

projects.title: Spatial Audio Experience App
projects.oneLineHook: I built a spatial audio AR app for Aural Mayhem, integrating FMOD, Wwise, AWS, and Addressables in Unity
projects.role: Lead Developer | AR & Audio Integration Specialist
projects.problem: I developed a cutting-edge spatial audio experience appfor Aural Mayhem, a sound engineering studio specializing in immersive audio technology. The app merges augmented reality (AR)with advanced spatial audio processing, creating a dynamic and interactive soundscape for users.
architectureHighlights: Custom Editor Tools:Designed Unity Editor extensionsfor sound designers to easily fine-tune spatial audio parameters.Built a modular workflow toolset, improving efficiency and iteration speed for designers and developers.

manualProjects.title: Orchestrator
manualProjects.oneLineHook: A Node/Express orchestration system for AI-assisted coding workflows across local repositories with REST and MCP interfaces.
manualProjects.problem: Needed a reliable way to orchestrate AI-assisted execution on local repositories with task state, streaming output, and safe git-isolated workspaces.
approach: Designed a Node/Express application with persistent task/run/log/message state and streamed execution output.
Implemented per-task git worktrees, session resume/discovery, and both REST and MCP APIs for integrations.
Added planning mode, retry/fallback behavior, and authentication/scope controls for safe operation.
architectureHighlights: REST API and MCP API surface for orchestration access.
Persistent runtime data model for tasks, runs, logs, messages, and metadata.
Per-task detached git worktrees and guarded deletion behavior.
systemDesignHighlights: Session discovery/resume flow for follow-up runs.
Plan mode with read-only planning, persisted thread state, and plan deltas.
Retry/fallback logic and interrupted-state recovery on restart.
Auth design with token mode, OAuth/JWT + JWKS validation, and scope enforcement.
keyContributions: Built the system from the ground up.
Designed and implemented orchestration flows, API surfaces, and safety constraints.
Defined reliability and observability mechanisms including bounded log tailing.
